packageRules.description: Major updates: shown in Dependency Dashboard as a checkbox. Renovate only opens the PR once you tick it, then assigns you for manual review and merge.
Group patch updates per package manager; hold 7 days to let the community catch supply-chain attacks before auto-merging on green CI
Group minor updates per package manager; hold 14 days to let the community catch supply-chain attacks before auto-merging on green CI
